subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on Dec 14th, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Dec 14th, 2025

subject: defensible cave
fact: The party found a defensible cave with a single entrance in the Underdark.
source_quote: the party stumbled upon a defensible cave with a single entrance

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim suggested the party rest in the cave.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggested they rest there

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim had made questionable decisions while under the influence of madness previously.
source_quote: his previous questionable decisions while under the influence of madness

subject: alarm trap setup
fact: The party set up an improvised alarm trap with string and metal at the cave entrance.
source_quote: they set up an improvised alarm trap with string and metal at the entrance

subject: rest duration
fact: The party rested for eight uneventful hours.
source_quote: After eight uneventful hours of rest

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim smugly reminded the party that not everything in the Underdark was out to get them.
source_quote: Bramgrim smugly reminded them that not everything in the Underdark was out to get them

subject: scream in tunnels
fact: A ragged scream suddenly choked off echoed from the tunnels ahead.
source_quote: a ragged scream suddenly choked off echoed from the tunnels ahead

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan is a filthy, traumatized commoner found in the tunnels.
source_quote: a woman named Teegan protectively standing over a man named Drystan

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is a filthy, traumatized commoner found in the tunnels.
source_quote: a man named Drystan, who sat rocking and clutching his knees

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan bore visible lash marks and torn clothing.
source_quote: Both bore visible lash marks and torn clothing

subject: Drystan
fact: Dried blood pooled near Drystan from wounds in his ears.
source_quote: dried blood pooled near Drystan from wounds in his ears

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan initially accused the party of working with their captor.
source_quote: Teegan initially accused the party of working with their captor

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is identified as the captor of Teegan and Drystan.
source_quote: their captor, Maram il Vass

subject: Barlgura demons
fact: Two ugly Barlgura demons burst from behind the commoners.
source_quote: two ugly Barlgura demons burst from behind

subject: Barlgura demons
fact: The Barlgura demons howled about recapturing the pets.
source_quote: howling about recapturing "the pets"

subject: combat with demons
fact: The demons attacked with tormenting bites and thrashing claws.
source_quote: The demons attacked with tormenting bites and thrashing claws

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Spectral guardians swirled around Bramgrim as he channeled radiant energy.
source_quote: Spectral guardians swirled around Bramgrim as he channeled radiant energy

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas's arrows found their marks with deadly precision.
source_quote: Akritas's arrows found their marks with deadly precision

subject: Daein
fact: One demon attempted to torment Daein with horrifying psychic visions.
source_quote: Despite one demon's attempt to torment Daein with horrifying psychic visions

subject: demons defeated
fact: The demons dissolved into dust and ochre upon defeat.
source_quote: watching as the demons dissolved into dust and ochre upon defeat

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan revealed that she and Drystan had been enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years.
source_quote: She and Drystan had been enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan and Drystan were captured by orcs and sold into the Underdark.
source_quote: captured by orcs and sold into the Underdark

subject: escape from slavery
fact: Teegan and Drystan escaped a day ago while being led out to feed on mushrooms.
source_quote: They had escaped only a day ago while being led out to feed on mushrooms

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan confirmed that a Drow had been brought to Maram's palace.
source_quote: Teegan confirmed that a Drow had indeed been brought to Maram's palace

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth is a deceptively polite deep gnome who guards the palace.
source_quote: Gabberforth, a deceptively polite deep gnome who guarded the palace

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan drove a sharpened stick into both his ears to escape the torment.
source_quote: he had driven a sharpened stick into both his ears to escape the torment

fact: The party decided to save their most powerful revelatory magic for when they faced Maram directly.
source_quote: deciding to save their most powerful revelatory magic for when they faced Maram directly

subject: travel duration
fact: The party traveled for another day.
source_quote: After another day's travel

subject: Maram's palace
fact: The party emerged into a vast cavern dominated by a structure of black and red marble.

fact: The palace domes were lit by eerie blue, green, and purple fairy fire.

fact: The palace had ornate brass doors carved with images of a half-elf's rise to power.

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth demanded to know the party's business.

fact: The palace was filled with expensive incense and perfume.

subject: grand chamber
fact: The party was led to a grand chamber where a rakishly handsome half-elf sat behind a desk.

subject: purple wood desk
fact: The desk was made of unusual purple wood.

fact: The half-elf was revealed as a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth, a demon of contracts and deals.

fact: The Yugoloth had demonic jaws and claws.

fact: Maram suggested trading Bramgrim when the party refused to trade Felkur.

fact: Maram demanded ten thousand gold pieces or two rare magical items as his true price.

source_quote: carved with self-adulating images of a half-elf in various stages of becoming rich and powerful

subject: Tapestries
fact: Two large tapestries in the entrance foyer depict the story of a self-made half-elf of extraordinary influence.
source_quote: depicting the story of a self-made half-elf of extraordinary influence

subject: Vases with Fresh Flowers
fact: Tall vases lining the hallway in Maram il Vass's palace are filled with fresh flowers.
source_quote: filled with fresh flowers

subject: Glass Containers with Creatures
fact: Glass containers in the hallway hold various small and unusual creatures such as fish, birds, reptiles, and other curiosities.
source_quote: filled with various small and unusual creatures such as fish, birds, reptiles, and other curiosities

subject: Desk of Purple Wood
fact: A large desk made of unusual purple wood is situated in the middle of the grand chamber.
source_quote: situated in the middle of the grand chamber

subject: Desk of Purple Wood
fact: Maram il Vass conducts his business at the desk of purple wood.
source_quote: where Maram il Vass conducts his business

subject: Contract
fact: Maram il Vass presented a document to the party initially described as a 'wrong contract'.
source_quote: initially a 'wrong contract'

subject: Contract
fact: The party scrutinized the proposed contract for loopholes to ensure Maram won't spy on them.
source_quote: party scrutinizes for loopholes to ensure Maram won't spy on them

subject: Pass Without Trace cast
fact: Daein cast Pass Without Trace to allow the party to move stealthily through the tunnels.
source_quote: Cast by Daein to allow the party to move stealthily through the tunnels

subject: Spirit Guardians cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Spirit Guardians at fourth level during combat with the Barlgura demons.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim at fourth level during combat with the Barlgura demons

subject: Spirit Guardians effect
fact: The Spirit Guardians aura damaged both demons with radiant energy and halved the speed of one of them.
source_quote: damaged both demons with radiant energy and halved the speed of one of them

subject: Phantasmal Killer cast
fact: A Barlgura demon cast Phantasmal Killer on Daein.
source_quote: Cast by a Barlgura demon on Daein

subject: Phantasmal Killer effect
fact: The spell inflicted psychic damage each round and imposed disadvantage on attack rolls due to a failed Wisdom saving throw.
source_quote: inflicting psychic damage each round and imposing disadvantage on attack rolls due to a failed Wisdom saving throw

subject: Hunter's Mark cast
fact: Akritas cast Hunter's Mark on one of the Barlgura demons.
source_quote: Cast by Akritas on one of the Barlgura demons

subject: Hunter's Mark effect
fact: The mark allowed Akritas to deal additional damage with weapon attacks.
source_quote: allowing Akritas to deal additional damage with weapon attacks

subject: Favorite Foe used
fact: Akritas used Favorite Foe in conjunction with Hunter's Mark to enhance her damage against the marked demon.
source_quote: Used by Akritas in conjunction with Hunter's Mark, this ability further enhanced her damage against the marked demon

subject: Toll the Dead cast
fact: Bramgrim cast Toll the Dead on a Barlgura demon.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on a Barlgura demon

subject: Toll the Dead effect
fact: The spell dealt necrotic damage to the target if it failed a Wisdom saving throw.
source_quote: dealing necrotic damage to the target if it fails a Wisdom saving throw

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas leveled up to 11th level.
source_quote: gained by Akritas upon leveling up to 11th level

subject: Volley ability gained
fact: Akritas gained the Volley ability upon leveling up to 11th level.
source_quote: A new ability gained by Akritas upon leveling up to 11th level

subject: Volley ability effect
fact: Volley allows Akritas to make a ranged attack against any number of creatures within 10 feet of a point she can see.
source_quote: allowing her to use her action to make a ranged attack against any number of creatures within 10 feet of a point she can see

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas considered taking the Silence spell upon leveling up.
source_quote: A third-level spell Akritas considers taking upon leveling up

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim added the Command spell to his repertoire upon leveling up.
source_quote: A spell Bramgrim adds to his repertoire upon leveling up

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim gained the True Seeing spell upon leveling up.
source_quote: A powerful 6th-level spell Bramgrim gains upon leveling up

subject: True Seeing effect
fact: True Seeing allowed Bramgrim to see through illusions, invisibility, and into the ethereal plane.
source_quote: allowing him to see through illusions, invisibility, and into the ethereal plane

subject: True Seeing effect
fact: The spell lasted for one hour.
source_quote: It lasts for one hour

subject: True Seeing revelation
fact: True Seeing revealed Maram il Vass's true form as a Yugoloth.
source_quote: revealing the true nature of things. It was used to reveal Maram il Vass's true form as a Yugoloth

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim learned the Tongues spell upon leveling up.
source_quote: A spell Bramgrim learns upon leveling up

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim already possesses the Banishment spell.
source_quote: A spell Bramgrim already possesses

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur discussed Cure Wounds as a potential candidate for his Spell Storing Item ability.
source_quote: discussed by Felkur as a potential candidate for his Spell Storing Item ability

subject: Cure Wounds capacity
fact: Cure Wounds provides 10 uses of healing for the Spell Storing Item.
source_quote: providing 10 uses of healing

subject: Barlgura demons
fact: The party engaged in combat with Barlgura demons.
source_quote: during combat with the Barlgura demons

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass's true form is a Yugoloth.
source_quote: revealing the true nature of things. It was used to reveal Maram il Vass's true form as a Yugoloth

subject: Barlgura demons
fact: Barlgura demons are creatures that can be dismissed by the Banishment spell.
source_quote: particularly useful against demons

subject: Spell Storing Item discussion
fact: Felkur discussed the Enlarge/Reduce spell as a potential candidate for his Spell Storing Item.
source_quote: A second-level spell discussed by Felkur as a potential candidate for his Spell Storing Item

subject: Spell Storing Item discussion
fact: Felkur discussed the Levitate spell as a potential candidate for his Spell Storing Item.
source_quote: A second-level spell discussed by Felkur as a potential candidate for his Spell Storing Item

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is a loyal companion to the party who participates in combat.
source_quote: A loyal companion to the party who participates in combat

subject: Owlbear combat injury
fact: During the battle with the Barlgura demons, the Owlbear was attacked and knocked prone.
source_quote: During the battle with the Barlgura demons, it was attacked and knocked prone

subject: Owlbear recovery
fact: The Owlbear recovered using its second wind.
source_quote: but recovered using its second wind

subject: Owlbear level up
fact: The Owlbear levels up with the party to 11th level.
source_quote: It levels up with the party to 11th level

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan is a commoner enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years after being captured by orcs.
source_quote: A commoner enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years after being captured by orcs

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan is protective of her brother Drystan.
source_quote: She is protective of her brother Drystan

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan was initially suspicious of the party.
source_quote: and initially suspicious of the party

subject: Teegan shares information
fact: After the party defeated the demons, Teegan shared vital information about Maram il Vass, the Drow prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this, and the palace's defenses.
source_quote: after they defeat the demons, she shares vital information about Maram il Vass, the Drow prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this, and the palace's defenses

subject: Teegan refusal
fact: Teegan refuses to follow the party further into the palace.
source_quote: She refuses to follow the party further into the palace

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is Teegan's brother and was also enslaved by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Teegan's brother, also enslaved by Maram il Vass

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is found in a state of mental breakdown, rocking and with self-inflicted wounds from shoving a pointed stick into both of his ears.
source_quote: He is found in a state of mental breakdown, rocking and with self-inflicted wounds from shoving a pointed stick into both of his ears

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is unable to communicate.
source_quote: He is unable to communicate

subject: Barlgura
fact: Two Barlgura demons ambushed the party.
source_quote: Two ugly-looking demons that ambushed the party

subject: Barlgura
fact: The Barlgura demons were interested in recapturing Teegan and Drystan, whom they called 'the pets'.
source_quote: interested in recapturing Teegan and Drystan, whom they called 'the pets'

subject: Barlgura
fact: The Barlgura demons can climb and attack with tormenting bites and thrash attacks.
source_quote: but can climb and attack with tormenting bites and thrash attacks

subject: Barlgura defeat
fact: The Barlgura demons were defeated by the party and turned into dust and ochre.
source_quote: They were defeated by the party and turned into dust and ochre

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass initially appeared as a 'rakishly handsome half-elf'.
source_quote: Initially appearing as a 'rakishly handsome half-elf'

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass was revealed by True Seeing to be a Yugoloth, a type of demon specializing in contracts and information.
source_quote: he is revealed by True Seeing to be a Yugoloth, a type of demon specializing in contracts and information

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is the captor of the Drow named Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: He is the captor of the Drow named Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Maram il Vass negotiation attempt
fact: Maram il Vass attempted to negotiate for the Drow's release first by trading Felkur.
source_quote: attempts to negotiate for the Drow's release, first by trading Felkur

subject: Maram il Vass negotiation attempt
fact: Maram il Vass attempted to negotiate for the Drow's release for 10,000 gold pieces or two rare magical items.
source_quote: then for 10,000 gold pieces or two rare magical items

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass speaks of the endless blood war.
source_quote: He speaks of the endless blood war

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass has knowledge of the party members' pasts.
source_quote: and has knowledge of the party members' pasts

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth is a deep gnome who serves as a guard and majordomo for Maram il Vass.
source_quote: A deep gnome who serves as a guard and majordomo for Maram il Vass

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth guards the entrance to the palace.
source_quote: guards the entrance to the palace

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth is accompanied by a shield guardian.
source_quote: accompanied by a shield guardian

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: A Shield Guardian stands sentry at the entrance to Maram il Vass's palace.
source_quote: A construct that stands sentry at the entrance to Maram il Vass's palace

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a Drow held captive by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: A Drow held captive by Maram il Vass

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was brought to Maram il Vass by fire giants while unconscious and in bad shape.
source_quote: brought to him by fire giants while unconscious and in bad shape

subject: Xaven Tanor'this rescue
fact: The party is seeking to rescue or retrieve Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The party is seeking to rescue or retrieve him
